update.author: Dara Okonjo
update.done_this_week: Incident on adjacent service consumed the week; work is paused.
update.target_next_week: Reassign to a different owner so the current one can help elsewhere.
update.blockers: External vendor SLA slipping; no eta.

update.author: Ellis Marín
update.done_this_week: Scope grew after user testing; trimming to hit the reduced target.
update.target_next_week: Realign with the partner team and reset the delivery date.
update.blockers: Owner is oncall this week; capacity is halved.

update.done_this_week: Cleared the staging soak; production rollout scheduled for early next week.
update.target_next_week: Complete the final code review and enable the feature flag globally.
update.blockers: Adjacent team is mid-migration — could take longer to help if we hit a snag.

update.done_this_week: Scope grew after user testing; trimming to hit the reduced target.
update.target_next_week: Reduce scope to the top-2 use cases and land a partial fix.

Weekly Objective Update — Gamma Runtime — Week 9

- At risk: 3 (1 red, 2 yellow)

- Done: 1

- Blockers / risks: 4

Please find the latest objective health report.
